description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.

outputs.description: The Name of the EDL from the Generic Indicators Export Service instance EDLChecker.Status The HTTP Status Code returned by the EDL
outputs.name: EDLChecker.Name

outputs.description: The Response or Error from the check. EDLChecker.ItemsOnList The number of indicators on the list, assuming a successful response!
outputs.name: EDLChecker.Response
